# Tom Hasegawa

Tom Hasegawa is the Head of Operations at Initech and the internal lead for data gathering across global business units for both the SBTi target-setting and pay-equity workstreams. He coordinates with regional HR and facilities teams to ensure emissions and workforce data is complete and consistently structured. Tom's operational reach is essential for data coverage in markets where sustainability reporting infrastructure is still developing.
